message:
perf(extensions): cache canonicalized extension roots, modernize let-else, reformat lock chains

extensions_js.rs:
- Add canonical_extension_roots field to PiJsModuleState that stores
  pre-canonicalized paths, avoiding repeated filesystem canonicalize()
  calls during every module import resolution
- Populate canonical roots in add_extension_root() alongside raw roots
- Use cached canonical roots in JsModuleResolver::resolve() instead of
  calling safe_canonicalize() per root per resolution
- Update resolve_module_path() signature to accept canonical_roots

extensions.rs:
- Reformat chained .lock().expect() calls to multi-line for readability
  in runtime_risk_config(), send_ui_request(), EventCoalescer dispatch
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to dispatch_fire_and_forget()
- Reformat mock set_label() in tests

auth.rs:
- Modernize match-on-read to let-else pattern: `let Ok(n) = stream.read(&mut buf) else { return; }`

providers/openai.rs:
- Update doc comment to say Cow<'_, str> instead of &'static str
  and remove mention of leaking heap copies (the function already
  returns Cow, no leak occurs)

interactive/commands.rs:
- Minor formatting cleanup on event_tx.try_send() line

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
